name: Hamburger Hot Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ground chuck or lean ground beef
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
In skillet, lightly brown ground beef; drain well. Add garlic powder, salt and pepper; set aside.
Place half the potatoes and half the onions in greased Crock-Pot.
Add browned beef.
Top with remaining potatoes and onions.
Combine mushroom soup and water; spread over top, being sure to moisten and cover evenly.
Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
